title: Department Manager Vacancy at Liberty Shoes Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Liberty Shoes Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Liberty Shoes Ventures Solutions! We are hiring a Department Manager for our Howrah team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Liberty Shoes Ventures Solutions:
Liberty Shoes Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Liberty Shoes Ventures Solutions!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
